chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يَلْزَمُ مَنْ يَحْفِرُ الْبِئْرَ فَيَقَعُ فِيهَا الْمَارُّ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 41 – What necessitates the one who digs the well, so there falls in it the passer-by

text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يَحْفِرُ الْبِئْرَ فِي دَارِهِ أَوْ فِي مِلْكِهِ فَقَالَ مَا كَانَ حَفَرَ فِي دَارِهِ أَوْ فِي مِلْكِهِ فَلَيْسَ عَلَيْهِ ضَمَانٌ وَ مَا حَفَرَ فِي الطَّرِيقِ أَوْ فِي غَيْرِ مِلْكِهِ فَهُوَ ضَامِنٌ لِمَا يَسْقُطُ فِيهَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Abu Ayoub, from Sama’at who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the man who dug the well in his house, or in his kingdom. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Whatever he had dug in his house or in his kingdom, so there is no responsibility upon him, and whatever he dug in the road, or in other than is kingdom, so he is responsibility to whatever falls into it’.
